description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof and a symmetrical front facade. The front yard is enclosed by a low hedge and features flowering bushes, while the driveway leads to a double garage on the right. The house is surrounded by lush landscaping, including tall trees and manicured shrubs, with a backyard that contains a small blue swimming pool. Large windows are arranged in a balanced pattern on both floors, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is centrally located, flanked by decorative plants and a short pathway. The overall design is clean and orderly, with a focus on residential comfort and curb appeal.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a double garage, and landscaped front and back yards with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, double garage, and decorative landscaping with flowering bushes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, garage extension, and backyard pool area with dense tree coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, and large windows facing the garden, framed by tall shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hedge-lined property boundary, side of the house, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a single door, short pathway, flanked by decorative plants and a low hedge, no porch or columns.
